name: default-ai-engineering-stack
description: The framework needs no external tools to run. The only one it actually calls is Semgrep (the optional Verify security-scan gate). The optional `impact` layer is a code knowledge-graph MCP that the AGENT (not the framework) uses to drive impact analysis. Spec / Loop / Memory are implemented by the framework's own Markdown templates and the AI agent.

verify.why: Invoked by execute_request.py as the security-scan gate. Optional: if it is not installed, the scan is reported as skipped (not a failure) and everything else still works.

impact.why: Optional. When configured as a Claude Code MCP server, the AGENT (not the framework) uses it in the Spec impact-analysis step: detect_changes (git diff -> affected symbols) + explore (transitive blast radius) fill the Impact Analysis table from the graph instead of by hand, and decide which interfaces need tests before coding. The framework never calls the binary. If absent, the agent falls back to manual impact analysis plus the framework's own symbol->test mapping and blind spots.
